data.body: Decomposed into 6 child stories (parented, gate-passing, dep-linked): S1 bored-tag-sale (fcaf — gate/ACL config; inherits f8e6233f membership policy + f51eb171/f90d5449 back-out wording), S2 urge-brook-plume (29a6 — bot merge path; inherits fe192771 signature, f95ed0c3 caps, f0f74d65 _FakeGerrit, fc2fb799 latency, f487d44b alarm; verify: make lint/test), S3 will-tile-plum (2e8a — g2p/CI verification; inherits f6a211e0 merge-refspec check; DO NOT start before 1fa8 closes), S4 perky-art-yodel (e7ab — docs + sweep), S5 leafy-vogue-ingot (a5b5 — 7-scenario live E2E; epic close gate), S6 norm-dam-swab (72b8 — policy/back-out/cost). Deps: S2<-S1; S4<-S1,S2,S3; S5<-S1,S2,S3; S6<-S5. Cross-epic 1fa8 dependency intentionally held at epic level only (validate flags cross-epic child deps). Each story needs its own plan review before claim.
